name: Ancient Dragon Florissax
description: Ancient Dragon Florissax is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Spirit in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Ancient Dragon Florissax is a powerful spirit that uses her dragonbolt and increases damage negation to herself and allies.
location:
Where to Find Ancient Dragon Florissax 
 WARNING: DOING THIS WILL LOCK YOU OUT OF THE PRIESTESS HEART (The one that buffs dragon cult incantations, You can get a different dragon transformations stone called ''Rock Heart'' from another place that buffs dragon communion spells instead.) 
 Find Thiollier near Pillar Path Cross (after the bridge and on your way to dragon's pit, the leftmost/eastmost path leading to a small swamp on map). Exhaust his dialogue. [Edit] just to clarify that the road doesn't really lead to the swamp (which is down below the cliff), it just looks like so on the map) 
 Go back to the blessing outside Belurat and talk to Moore. He will give you an item for Thiollier called Black Syrup 
 Deliver the Black Syrup item to Thiollier and exhaust the dialogue again to obtain another item: Thiollier's Concoction. (You can buy many of these from his shop after) 
 Give Thiollier's Concoction item to the Dragon Communion Priestess (near Grand Altar of Dragon Communion) at night, this will put her to sleep. Wait for a few rounds and she will have woken up, exhaust her dialogue. 
 Kill Bayle the Dread. Remember to summon Igon if you're doing his quest (his sign is within the arena, to the left after you enter the mist) 
 Go to the Altar and talk to her, confess to putting her to sleep and accept to become her lord. collect her ash. 
 [Map Link]

name: Bigmouth Imp Ashes
description: Bigmouth Imp Ashes is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Spirit in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Bigmouth Imp Ashes summons an imp that can use cannon-like ranged attacks from its mouth.
location:
Where to Find Bigmouth Imp Ashes 
 Darklight Catacombs: After descending to a lower level for a second time, you will find yourself in a hall with a giant Bigmouth Imp shooting fireballs at you. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Link] 
Take a left and pull the lever to enlighten the room and lower the platform which the giant Bigmouth Imp is standing on. Kill the imp and loot the Great Ghost Glovewort and then proceed to drop onto the path behind the platform. You will find Bigmouth Imp Ashes in the treasure chest ahead.

name: Black Knight Captain Huw
description: Black Knight Captain Huw is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring, introduced in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Black Knight Captain Huw wields a black steel twinblade and can grow a golden pair of wings, allowing him to launch into the air and perform a diving, spinning strike with his weapon. He is the son of Black Knight Commander Andreas and served under Messmer the Impaler’s command.
location:
Where to Find Black Knight Captain Huw 
 Scorpion River Catacombs: Found at the end of the L-shaped corridor with crushing spike traps.  Past the first ceiling with the falling spikes, reach the Yellow Fulgurbloom and turn right, you will see x2 Messmer Soldiers and a Black Knight. Between both of you, there is another ceiling with spikes, be mindful when engaging in combat. Once those enemies are defeated, head to the coffin at the end to find the Spirit Ashes. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Location]

name: Black Knight Commander Andreas
description: Black Knight Commander Andreas is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring, introduced in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Black Knight Commander Andreas was the first leader of Messmer the Impaler’s army, once summoned, he wields massive equipment and excels at tanking.He was imprisoned in an underground tomb alongside his son, Black Knight Captain Huw.
location:
Where to Find Black Knight Commander Andreas 
 It's located in Fog Rift Catacombs in a room accessed by riding a spike trap upward.  From the raised walkway that has a sniper glintstone sorcerer, go up the stairs into a room with two Messmer Soldiers and a Black Knight nearby.   Next to where the Messmer Soldiers were standing is an archway ledge that overlooks a spike trap room.  Stand at the open archway in the southeast corner of the room so that the spike trap triggers in front of you.   Look southeast and upward and you will see a secret hallway high up near the ceiling of the room.  Wait for the spike trap to fall down and jump onto it.  Ride the spike trap upward and go through the raised southeast corridor.   You’ll come to an open coffin with the item inside. [Map Link] [Video Link]

name: Bloodfiend Hexer's Ashes
description: Bloodfiend Hexer's Ashes is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Spirit in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Bloodfiend Hexer's Ashes uses a spear that enables it to cast bloodflame hexes.
location:
Where to Find Bloodfiend Hexer's Ashes 
 This is dropped by the Chief Bloodfiend Boss. Chief Bloodfiend can be found inside Rivermouth Cave. You can get to Rivermouth Cave by heading South from Temple Town Ruins  site of grace and jumping down the coffin steps, or by heading northwest from Ellac River Cave.   [Video Link]

name: Curseblade Meera
description: Curseblade Meera is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Spirit in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Curseblade Meera summons an agile and powerful Curseblade. It is dropped by defeating Curseblade Labirith, at Bonny Gaol.
location:
Where to Find Curseblade Meera 
 Dropped by Curseblade Labirith at the end of Bonny Gaol. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Map Link] [Video Link]

name: Demi-Human Swordsman Yosh
description: Demi-Human Swordsman Yosh is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a Spirit Ash in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Demi-Human Swordsman Yosh is a nimble and agile swordsman.
location:
Where to Find Demi-Human Swordsman Yosh 
 Dropped by the Demi-Human Swordmaster Onze boss. Demi-Human Swordmaster Onze can be found at the bottom of the Belurat Gaol. Players will find the entrance to this area by going to the lake west of the Belurat Tower Settlement. The entrance to the dungeon is littered with cages, making it easier to spot. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Link]

name: Divine Bird Warrior Ornis
description: Divine Bird Warrior Ornis is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Spirit in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Divine Bird Warrior Ornis summons the spirit ashes of Ornis, the divine bird warrior who fights while clad in golden armor.
location:
Where to Find Divine Bird Warrior Ornis 
 Temple Town Ruins Site of Grace: Head north past the large Scarlet Buds and Kindreds of Rot. Go uphill and activate the spiritspring and use it to jump on ruins above. [Map Link] 
There is an opening to the right side which lets you walk on the ledge. Continue on the ledge, jump across the gap and then make your way uphill.You can find this spirit summon inside the treasure chest in the building uphill.

name: Fingercreeper Ashes
description: Fingercreeper Ashes is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Spirit in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Fingercreeper Ashes allows the caster to summon a small Fingercreeper, which fights alongside the caster and can also help by casting a healing spell.
location: Finger Ruins of Dheo: From Fingerstone Hill Site of Grace, head southeast down the path (avoiding/handling the hordes of fingercreepers) until you come to two large finger statues protruding from the ground on your left, somewhat overhanging the road. Turn immediately left, just before the large fingercreeper lying in wait, and head east between the two finger statues. After a short drop down, keep to the left of the large fallen finger statue. Just ahead will be a rock wall with a hole just in front of it, as well as a goodly amount of Lesser Fingercreepers in front of, inside it and behind you on the wall. Drop down into the hole. A Colossal Fingercreeper will emerge and block your way, but you can run across to the safety of the exit tunnel if you are quick and mounted. The Ashes can be looted from the corpse in the middle of the arena. [Map Link]

name: Fire Knight Hilde
description: Fire Knight Hilde is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Spirit in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Fire Knight Hilde uses a greatsword and can perform certain fire incantations.
location:
Where to Find Fire Knight Hilde 
 Shadow Keep: From the gear in which you found Wrath from Afar, jump towards the next platform and head to the ladder on the left. Climb it up. Once at the top, take the wooden beam on your left and turn right towards the lift. Activate the lift but quickly return to the platform. Another lift will appear do the same, and jump on the first lift Roof. Stay there until it stops. Jump across the platform to reach the corpse on the other side and loot the Spirit Ash. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Location]

name: Fire Knight Queelign
description: Fire Knight Queelign is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Spirit in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Fire Knight Queelign uses a greatsword that resembles a spear, and can also perform fire spells.
location:
Where to Find Fire Knight Queelign 
 Give Fire Knight Queelign the Iris of Grace. 
 The NPC is located in the Prayer Room of the Church District in Shadow Keep. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] 
 Video Location

name: Gravebird Ashes
description: Gravebird Ashes is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Spirit in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Gravebird Ashes summons who performs aerial attacks and can also use ghostflame to deal damage to enemies.
location:
Where to Find Gravebird Ashes 
 Charo's Hidden Grave: Use the spiritspring to reach the area, you'll find this item surrounded by gravestones. [Map Link]

name: Horned Warrior Ashes
description: Horned Warrior Ashes is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Spirit in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Horned Warrior Ashes summons a powerful melee fighter that employs a curved greatsword.
location:
Where to Find Horned Warrior Ashes 
 Can be found in Enir-Ilim after the Spiral Rise site of grace. You'll climb the spiral stairs, kill 4 birds and then jump off the stairs case onto another staircase below. The ashes will be on one of 3 items of the 3 corpses. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Link] 
 
 The map location is here (someone please update this with a map link because I don't know how to add locations to the wiki map).

name: Inquisitor Ashes
description: Inquisitor Ashes is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Spirit in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Inquisitor Ashes summons two hornsent wielding candlesticks, each one of them uses different abilities in combat.
location:
Where to Find Inquisitor Ashes 
 They can be found on a corpse in Enir-Ilim, beneath the second to last enemy before reaching the Spiral Rise site of grace (coming from First Rise site of grace). [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Link] 
 
 From Spiral Rise site of grace, head east down the staircase. After killing the second enemy, take the small, easily missed staircase on the north side down, go through the doorway on the right leading under the larger staircase and you'll find the spirit ashes unprotected on a corpse.

name: Jolan and Anna
description: Jolán and Anna is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Spirit in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Jolán and Anna summons two powerful Swordhands of Night, which employ a sword and claws to attack.
location:
Where to Find Jolán and Anna 
 Jolán and Anna are accessed by interacting with the puppet body of Anna at the secret top part of Rabbath's Rise while in the possession of Swordhand of Night Jolán  
 To acquire the spirit summon of Jolán, you must complete the questline of Count Ymir, and give Jolán the Iris of Grace at the end. 
 To get to Anna's puppet body afterwards, you must come from the side of Scaduview (closest grace would be the Hinterland site of grace) and head to the Shaman Village, from there you will find a pathway at the back of the village, travelling down the cliffside, leading to a secret top part of Rabbath's Rise. Here you will find her puppet body, where you will be asked to combine the spirits together, claiming this spirit summon. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Man-Fly Ashes
description: Man-Fly Ashes is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Spirit in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Man-Fly Ashes summons a squad of three members, which employ diverse tactics to attack their targets. While two of them attack from the air, the third one uses poison attacks from the rear.
location:
Where to Find Man-Fly Ashes 
 Spirit Ashes looted from a grub corpse in Village of the Flies. Can only be accessed by going down the river from Shadow Keep and unlocking the Recluses River Downstream site of grace area. The Ashes are found on the top part of the village, guarded by two shadow casters and several man-fly enemies. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Messmer Soldier Ashes
description: Messmer Soldier Ashes is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Spirit in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Messmer Soldier Ashes summons two members of the Impaler's army. One wields an axe, and the other one a spear.
location:
Where to Find Messmer Soldier Ashes 
 Fort of Reprimand: From the main courtyard where you fight the Omenkiller, turn due North while facing the gallows. A chute will be visible. It will lead outside where you will find the spirit ashes near a grave. [Map Link] [Video Location]

name: Spider Scorpion Ashes
description: Spider Scorpion Ashes is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Spirit in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Spider Scorpion Ashes summons an aberrant creature that uses both pincers and tail to attack its foes.
location:
Where to Find Spider Scorpion Ashes 
 Ancient Ruins of Rauh: In the area where the spider-scorpion hangs from a ceiling and there are a bunch of items on the ground. One of them is this. [Map Link] [Video Location]

name: Swordhand of Night Jolan
description: Swordhand of Night Jolán is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Spirit in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Swordhand of Night Jolán is a powerful swordhand of Night that wields a black sword capable of penetrating any guard.
location:
The Swordhand of Night Jolan can be obtained after completing Count Ymir's questline. After defeating Count Ymir, rest at the Cathedral of Manus Metyr - Site of Grace and return to Jolan's location to see her slumped over the pillar instead of standing and leaning against it [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map Link]. Speak to her to learn that you will need to give her either the Iris of Grace or Iris of Occultation. 
 Giving Jolan the Iris of Grace will reward you with the Swordhand of Night Jolan, a spirit ash summon that can also be converted into a 2-person summon. 
 Giving Jolan the Iris of Occultation instead, will reward you with the Sword of Night and ending her questline there. The weapon is a unique shadowy katana that partially ignores blocking/guard.

name: Taylew the Golem Smith
description: Taylew the Golem Smith is a Spirit and Summon in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Spirit in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Taylew the Golem Smith uses its own fists as projectiles.
location:
Where to Find Taylew the Golem Smith 
 Taylew's Ruined Forge: Return to the platform in the middle that you have moved with the lever, and head up. Jump to the left once you are near the top. Take the ladder up in the area, and interact with the furnace to receive the Spirit Ashes along with an Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone. [Map Link] [Video Location]

name: Spirit Ashes
description: Spirit Ashes in Elden Ring are companions, often mimicking the Lands Between's Enemies, summoned by the Spirit Calling Bell to aid you in Combat. This page covers how they function, the spirit ashes available, summon costs, and a community-driven list of their relative strength.
location: Location unknown.

name: Torrent (Spirit Steed)
description: Torrent the Spectral Steed is a mount in Elden Ring. Gifted to the Tarnished by Melina early in the game, he will be your constant companion, used for travel, exploration, and combat. This horned horse is summoned using the Spectral Steed Whistle and is highly agile, possessing a unique double jump ability that allows players to scale steep terrain and utilize Spiritsprings to reach otherwise inaccessible heights.
location: Location unknown.
